entry.title: Re: Create Advance tax return Italy "Execute and Print"
entry.content: Hi, did you fix this issue? we are facing the same, thank you

entry.title: Re: MBLB New Fields
entry.content: Before enhancing check also check ME2ON -otherwise, you always have the option to add a field catalog to the standard report or you always have an option to copy the standard to create a custom report with your report with any many fields you like 🙂

entry.title: Re: EOIO in SAP CI Using JMS - Exclusive Mode
entry.content: Good that you mention the word of caution! This is true, in my opinion, and limits the usefulness of this feature.

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA EHS Health and Safety Management (EHS-SUS...
entry.content:
Dear Paolo,

unfortunately, there is no such thing as Best Practice Content for the EHS Health and Safety Management (or formerly known as EHS Operational Risk Assessment). The closest thing to that - and to get you started with any kind of adaption and usage - is copying the standard customizing from client 000.

Regarding the difference from OnPrem and Public Cloud. As of S/4HANA 2023, the solutions available for OnPrem and Public Cloud are not the same solution. The OnPrem solution dates back to the Component Extension for SAP EHS Management (EHSM) add-on for ECC, whereas the Public Cloud solution is a fresh/new build.

With kind regards,

Michael

entry.title: Re: Current AI Core OCR Solution ?
entry.content: Hi, i really appreciate your quick answer. I do have a SAP AI Core License and i have also worked with the web api to interpret images before. But using base64 encoded images would mean i need to convert my files to images before running OCR and also im not sure which model to deploy exactly. I was hoping there is one that is specified on OCR or would u think that any model is fine since most of them have some type of image recognition ?

entry.title: Re: Issue Posting Service Invoice to SAP
entry.content: Hi Urvish, There was an error posting to SAP, please check the portal for the error message, below you will find a detailed dump of the information that was sent to SAP: { "AttachmentEntry": 74565, "CardCode": "SUPO0062", "DocType":"dDocument_Service", "DocDate": "Fri Mar 21 2025 16:23:52 GMT+0000 (Coordinated Universal Time)", "DocDueDate": "2025-04-21T00:00:00.000Z", "DocCurrency": "GBP", "U_ContainerNumber":"", "NumAtCard":H4194715, "Comments":"", "DocRate": NaN,"DocumentLines": [{ "AccountCode": "606301", "ItemDescription": "TYG Trading LTD Glasgow", "Quantity": 1, "UnitPrice": 108.7413, "Currency": "GBP", "VatGroup": "I1", "CostingCode": "UK", "CostingCode2":"Sales", "U_Department":"" },{ "AccountCode": "606301", "ItemDescription": "Langyu Edinburgh", "Quantity": 1, "UnitPrice": 108.7413, "Currency": "GBP", "VatGroup": "I1", "CostingCode": "UK", "CostingCode2":"Sales", "U_Department":"" },{ "AccountCode": "606301", "ItemDescription": "Shihe Seafood Ltd Manchester", "Quantity": 1, "UnitPrice": 108.7413, "Currency": "GBP", "VatGroup": "I1", "CostingCode": "UK", "CostingCode2":"Sales", "U_Department":"" },{ "AccountCode": "606301", "ItemDescription": "Aljia Limited Glasgow", "Quantity": 1, "UnitPrice": 108.7413, "Currency": "GBP", "VatGroup": "I1", "CostingCode": "UK", "CostingCode2":"Sales", "U_Department":"" },{ "AccountCode": "606301", "ItemDescription": "Chans Ltd Glasgow", "Quantity": 1, "UnitPrice": 108.7413, "Currency": "GBP", "VatGroup": "I1", "CostingCode": "UK", "CostingCode2":"Sales", "U_Department":"" },{ "AccountCode": "606301", "ItemDescription": "York Regency Associates Ltd York", "Quantity": 1, "UnitPrice": 96.339275, "Currency": "GBP", "VatGroup": "I1", "CostingCode": "UK", "CostingCode2":"Sales", "U_Department":"" },{ "AccountCode": "606301", "ItemDescription": "Fresh Asia Erith", "Quantity": 1, "UnitPrice": 180.2442, "Currency": "GBP", "VatGroup": "I1", "CostingCode": "UK", "CostingCode2":"Production", "U_Department":"" }] }

entry.title: Re: Current AI Core OCR Solution ?
entry.content:
@lprell  yes that's right, before running OCR.. you have to convert the image to Base64encoding

Available models to accept images.. there are 12 today.. (click on image to view better)

entry.title: Re: [BUG] wrong path mentioned in SMSETUP
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

This is Haterm from Diagnostics team. Hope you are well. I tried to check the URL you attached, but the link seemed invalid already. As you mentioned that the URL is for "Diagnostics Agent 7.2 Connectivity Troubleshooting". Can you please check if the documentation below is the one which you referred?
https://help.sap.com/docs/SUPPORT_CONTENT/techops/3821554842.html

And you are right, smdsetup.exe(Windows) or smdsetup.sh(Linux) is located in "/usr/sap/<SID_AGT>/SMDA<Instance_Number>/script", but not the /work folder of DAA.

To re-connect the DAA, please refer to resolution steps in KBA "2385361 - How to connect Diagnostics Agent to SAP Solution Manager 7.2 system". If it failed to connect with Solution Manager Java system, please collect the latest DAA support logs according to "2455767 - How to Generate or Download the Diagnostics Agent "Support Logs" - Solution Manager" and find the error message right after "Starting SMDAgent" line in latest SMDSystem.X.log of /logs folder.
Please search the displayed error in SAPForMe and see if there are available documentations for the error message. If no documentations are available, please raise a new case in component SV-SMG-DIA-SRV-AGT for further help.

Best regards,
Haterm

entry.title: Re: Agent determination ABAP customization for post general journal entries FIORI app
entry.content:
Hi,

Were you able to resolve this issue to override agents? 

We are looking at something on the same lines

entry.title: Re: Building Simple Networking App with Ease
entry.content: Yes, I clicked on "Download a copy" and I got the ZIP!

entry.title: Re: Joule for Developers: Word Search Challenge
entry.content: PROCESSGENERATION - Would love to see this in action. It will be very helpful to bridge the gap between functional and technical consultant i assume.

entry.title: Re: SAP B1 Common Functions Disappearing
entry.content: Do you happen to see the SAP Note related to this?

entry.title: Re: non stock items in EWM
entry.content:
When you say non-stock --it means you do not track inventory in any form EMW or IM--it does not matter how and what you are purchasing if it is non-stock means it will not track on a quantity basis-- Non-stock means non-stock e.g. Service you can not put in any warehouse 

Keep in mind if you keep items on a quantity basis anywhere you are also putting in extra FTE hours to upstream to make material code exist (if there is no material code then there is no tracking) and required to perform the transactions required to reduce the stock no matter whether you manage at the IM level or EWM. If still need materials that need to be tracked only quantity basis then do not call it non-stock -you can use material type UNBW to create material codes.

if you add EWM to the mix --then you are also signing up more FTE hours to set up the product master data of the Warehouse to move the stocks in the EWM side along with extra efforts of inbound delivery, Warehouse Orders, BINs, Goods receipt etc.

Determine the real business reason and also put some thoughts on the challenges the business will face if this goes this route. Everything is not a SAP solution you have to use your knowledge and consulting skills in such cases.

entry.title: Fieldglass - Multiple Item for Workorder and Integration with ARIBA PR/ PO
entry.content:
Hello,

 

I would like to get clarity on the below questions as much as possible :

 

  1. Can we create multiple lines on one Workorder ? If yes , does the integration between FG and Ariba will create one PO for Multiple WO Lines or One PO per WO line ?
  2. Can we create multiple lines on one SOW  ? If yes, does the integration between FG and Ariba will create one PO for Multiple  SOW Lines or One PO per SOW  line ?
  3. For multiple Cost Center for same WO line or SOW Line in Fieldglass, does the integration with Ariba will split the Ariba PO  with the same splitting in FG WO or FG SOW  ? Or does the WO or SOW integration in FG/Ariba is limited to only the Primary Cost Center (flag in FG) to be replicated in Ariba PO ?

 

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Migration of On-Going Project
entry.content: Since you are going into a S/4HANA system go to API.SAP.COM to get the latest APIs.

entry.title: Re: New SAP Gateway Demo System available
entry.content:
Hi Andre,

 

Could you help in identifying the error in ES5 ?

I am facing the the error :

value": "Property 'name' is invalid"

 when I tried to run HTTP Put for the productset item in ES5, Below is the json contents 

 

Have created API in BTP to call the ODATA in ES5

requests.put(
url=url,
json=update_data,
headers=headers,
cookies=cookies
)

 

 

product_data = {
"TypeCode": "PR",
"Category": "Pencils & Colouring",
"Name": "Colour Pencils",
"Description": "Hexagonal coloured pencils in 24 vibrant colours; Ultra-resistant lead to prevent breaking; Easy to sharpen Made from 50 per cent recycled material; hardwearing pencils resistant to chewing and splinter-proof.",
"SupplierID": "0100000063",
"TaxTarifCode": 1,
"MeasureUnit": "EA",
"WeightMeasure": "32.000",
"WeightUnit": "",
"CurrencyCode": "USD",
"Price": "8.90",
"Width": "0.000",
"Depth": "0.000",
"Height": "0.000",
"DimUnit": "CM"
}

 

Error:

Retrieving product HT-1042 to get ETag...
Retrieved ETag: W/"datetime'2025-03-21T01%3A00%3A29.0000000'"
Updating product HT-1042 with new data...
Error updating product. Status code: 400
Response: {"error":{"code":"/IWCOR/CX_DS_EP_PROPERTY_ERROR/00505692409C1ED6B8FE112855048EDA","message":{"lang":"en","value":"Property 'name' is invalid"},"innererror":{"application":{"component_id":"OPU-BSE-SDE","service_namespace":"/IWBEP/","service_id":"GWSAMPLE_BASIC","service_version":"0001"},"transactionid":"0DC968D4B56B0130E0067B9C36E49ADC","timestamp":"20250321164140.1361600","Error_Resolution":{"SAP_Transaction":"For backend administrators: use ADT feed reader \"SAP Gateway Error Log\" or run transaction /IWFND/ERROR_LOG on SAP Gateway hub system and search for entries with the timestamp above for more details","SAP_Note":"See SAP Note 1797736 for error analysis (https://service.sap.com/sap/support/notes/1797736)"},"errordetails":[]}}}
{
  "error": {
    "code": "/IWCOR/CX_DS_EP_PROPERTY_ERROR/00505692409C1ED6B8FE112855048EDA",
    "message": {
      "lang": "en",
      "value": "Property 'name' is invalid"
    },
    "innererror": {
      "application": {
        "component_id": "OPU-BSE-SDE",
        "service_namespace": "/IWBEP/",
        "service_id": "GWSAMPLE_BASIC",
        "service_version": "0001"
      },
      "transactionid": "0DC968D4B56B0130E0067B9C36E49ADC",

        "SAP_Transaction": "For backend administrators: use ADT feed reader \"SAP Gateway Error Log\" or run transaction /IWFND/ERROR_LOG on SAP Gateway hub system and search for entries with the timestamp above for more details",

      },
      "errordetails": []

developed a fact view using SLT Remote Tables it is working fine as expected, when ever I try to include the associations to get Key & Text or any Hierarchy it gives the below error from Analytical Model

entry.title: Re: Flexible Programming Model Explorer - page not loading
entry.content:
Not sure where you get that URL from but this is the correct one:

https://ui5.sap.com/test-resources/sap/fe/core/fpmExplorer/index.html#/buildingBlocks/rte/rteSection 

there is not double slash in the url

entry.title: Deprecated API call of 'sap.ushell.CrossApplicationNavigation.createEmptyAppState'
entry.content:
Does anyone know how to implement the successor of CrossApplicationNavigation.createEmptyAppState?  It seems it has been deprecated (sap.ushell.services.CrossApplicationNavigation - API Reference - Demo Kit - SAPUI5 SDK) and replaced by  (sap.ushell.services.Navigation - API Reference - Demo Kit - SAPUI5 SDK).  The error message I got from the console:  "Deprecated API call of 'sap.ushell.CrossApplicationNavigation.createEmptyAppState'. Please use 'createEmptyAppStateAsync' instead - sap.ushell.services.CrossApplicationNavigation"

When I tried to use it the deprecated method:

var xnavservice = sap.ushell && sap.ushell.Container && sap.ushell.Container.getService && sap.ushell.Container.getService("CrossApplicationNavigation");
           
//deprecated
var oAppState = xnavservice.createEmptyAppState(this.getOwnerComponent());
oAppState.setData(this.getView().getModel().oData);
oAppState.save();
 
Resulting in console error:  "Deprecated API call of 'sap.ushell.CrossApplicationNavigation.createEmptyAppState'. Please use 'createEmptyAppStateAsync' instead - sap.ushell.services.CrossApplicationNavigation"
 
 //Use the createEmptyAppStateAsync instead...
 var oAppState = xnavservice.createEmptyAppStateAsync(this.getOwnerComponent());
//oAppState returns promise with "pending" - not sure how to use it.  If anyone has an example would be great
 
oAppState.setData(this.getView().getModel().oData);
//this is where it errors out as setData isn't a function of oAppState.
 
Ultimately, I'm trying to save the AppState so then I can come back to it when I'm doing Cross Application Navigation.

entry.title: Re: SAP NetWeaver SUSE Cluster Integration – the *updated* sap_suse_cluster_connector version 3
entry.content:
Has anyone come across below error 

HAFailoverToNode FAIL: Instance not clustered error when executing test case HAFailoverToNode

All test cases are showing results as expected but this specific one for Failover does not work for us.

entry.title: unable to drill down in a Crystal report chart
entry.content:
I have recently installed a Crystal Server environment for a client - CS 2020 SP4 patch 11 on Windows Server 2019 with a SQL Server CMS.

When testing the environment they found that in reports where they had charts with grouped information that should have allowed drill-down, drill-down via the charts did not work. The drill down icon did not appear when hovering over the charts. Drill down worked normally when done from tables.

The problem affects both the Fiori viewer and the old DHTML viewer. It happens in the Launchpad and when run from the CMC.

The charts worked fine in the original system (Crystal Server 2016 SP6) even when being viewed via the same browser on the same machine as when they don't work on the new environment.

I installed a test system at the same patch level (CS 2020, SP4 patch 11, on Windows Server 2019) and checked the World Sales report and the drill down from the charts worked fine.

So the issue does not appear be linked to any of the patch level of the platform, the browser used (both Chrome and Edge were tested), or the operating system where the reports were being viewed.

Does anyone have any ideas?

thanks

Keith

entry.title: Re: Auto complete (without Credit Given) when Item/progra...
entry.content: @thakrit, as far as I understand, it wouldn't be possible to auto complete a course. It'd require an admin/user action in the system or via API. If the completion status doesn't give credit, it'll be added as a failure/an incomplete entry (Adding Course Completion Status).

entry.title: Problemas al actualizar orden usando B1S-ReplaceCollectionsOnPatch
entry.content:
Estimados buen día para todos, tengo el caso siguiente:
Estoy actualizando una Orden uso el metodo Patch, tambien uso B1S-ReplaceCollectionsOnPatch = true
el caso que cada vez que actualizo un documento, el campo "UnitPrice" no se actualiza en algunas líneas de detalle.

Lo único que he identificado es que si este valor coincide anteriormente simplemente lo deja en valor 0.

Recien cuando realizo un segundo envío este actualiza los valores correctos:

ya he probado agregandole el campo  "LineNum" pero en estos casos me sale el error

"value": "Esta entrada ya existe en las tablas siguientes (ODBC -2035)"

Les adjunto el json que genera la Orden (Generar_OC.txt) y el que modifica (Modificar_OC.txt)

espero me puedan brindar su apoyo.

Atte. Jose Vasquez

In above link I want to use Users.

Below is the destination set up

We are trying to call API from ABAP on Cloud and CAPM but it is failing in both cases below are the details.

From ABAP on Cloud:

 

When trying option 1 and 2 we are getting below error.

"401","detail":"Authentication credentials are invalid or not allowed for this endpoint."

CAPM:

After deploying to cloud foundry we get below error.

 

We get below error.

 

Surprisingly when we try from Postman hub it is working fine.

 Can anyone help?

entry.title: Welcome everyone
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I’m Natalia, and I’m excited to join the SAP community! I’ve worked in HR for several years, focusing on employee records and reporting, and now I’m looking to deepen my knowledge in SAP SuccessFactors from technical side.

I’m eager to learn more about how SAP SuccessFactors Platform can optimize HR processes, and I’m here to connect with others who can guide me on this journey. If you have any tips or insights, I’d love to hear from you

Looking forward to connecting with you all.

Best,

Nat

entry.title: Alternatives for tcode SCOV
entry.content:
Hello, is there a tcode like SCOV where I can check the skipped line of program and unused variables in 1 run

The SCOV is highlighting the skipped line of codes and unused variable, but I am not allowed to get an access for that tcode. Is there a tcode with almost same functionality of SCOV?

I also want to know if the program checks the line of codes without doing debug like this

entry.title: Re: Retry option in B2B Monitoring getting failed
entry.content:
Hi, are you using ProcessDirect Receiver Adapter?

I faced the same issue and the only solution seems to be to use Restart instead of Retry Function.

The ProcessDirect Address is determined in Step2 IFlow and this one is only executed with Restart.

BR

Andreas

entry.title: InventoryGenEntries with InternalSerialNumber
entry.content:
Good afternoon to all.

I would like to see if someone can help me. I can successfully enter products from my API using the endpoint 

https://XXXXXX:50000/b1s/v1/InventoryGenEntries with the body  

{
  "DocumentLines": [
    {
      "ItemCode": "410224",
      "Quantity": 1,
      "WarehouseCode": "001",
      "AccountCode": "1.01.004.01.002",
    }
  ]
} But now i need to send the lot number. I'm trying to do the following. 
{
"DocumentLines": [
{
"ItemCode": "410224",
"Quantity": 1,
"WarehouseCode": "001",
"AccountCode": "1.01.004.01.002",
"SerialNumbers": [
{
"InternalSerialNumber": "1424"
}
]
}
]
} but it give me this error  {
"error": {
"code": -10,
"message": {
"lang": "en-us",
"value": "10001172 - Blank strings are not allowed in row 1 (in unique field). [OSRN.SysNumber][line: 0]"
}
}
}. Can some one help me. Thank you!!!!

Thank you,

Satish

entry.title: SSCUI 100306 - Configure Product Types is not available anymore
entry.content:
How to maintain, create or remove product/material types on S/4HANA Public Cloud Edition?

This was done in SSCUI 100306 - Configure Product Types, however this seems not to be available anymore since 2502 update


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: SSCUI 100306 - Configure Product Types is not availab...
entry.content:
Hi there,

Please use SSCUI 500095 instead.

The SSCUI 100306 - Configure Product became obsolete on 2502 update.

Its successor is the SSCUI 500095 "Define Attributes of Material Types", which has been available since 2005 release.

Note: Material Type and Product Type are the same thing.

To create a new Product Type you have to copy an existing one.
In the following are the steps to create a new Product Type:

  1. Open the App Manage Your Solution
  2. select Configure Your Solution
  3. search for the SSCUI 500095 "Define Attributes of Material Types"
  4. Press Configure button
  5. Select a Product Type, for example FERT
  6. Click on "Copy As..." button
  7. Input the new Product type information
  8. Click on "Copy"

Kind regards,
Ícaro
SAP Support

entry.title: Re: Everything you need to know about SAP Cloud Transport Management _ End to End guide
entry.content: Hey @SayantaniDeb , those are blanks. They moved to a different portal now and hence, the blanks got created.

entry.title: Re: Vendor not recieving Remittance advice.

entry.title: Re: SSCUI 100306 - Configure Product Types is not availab...
entry.content: Edit: The SSCUI "Define Attributes of Material Types" code is 103539 instead of 500095.

entry.title: Re: An Introduction into the new Structured Persistence
entry.content:
Hi, 

Once you switch from XML to persistance table, how can we add the historical data ifrom the XLM persistence table into the new tables ? Any idea ?

Thanks,

EC

entry.title: Re: Switch off 'SSL certificate verification' setting in BPA
entry.content:
Hi,

You can install certificate in Windows trusted store in the VM/device in that network.

Or temporarily use 

rejectUnauthorized: false

in the API request.

entry.title: How to Change Local and Time Zone Settings for other users?
entry.content:
I am using BO 4.3 SP3 patch 4, and I need to know if there is a way to change Local and Time Zone Settings for other users by the Administrator via CMC?

We are aware of options how this could be done by individual users but we need to control it centrally and is there a way that the Administrator can set this up for everyone?

Thanks!


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to Change Local and Time Zone Settings for other...
entry.content: We tested options on CMC > Users and Groups to change the Local and Time Zone settings for multiple users at once, but got no results.

entry.title: Re: Old System Keeps Reappearing in SOLMAN 7.2 After Dele...
entry.content: There's only one SLD, but you can explain-me how i remove the RZ70 config?

entry.title: Re: Alternatives for tcode SCOV
entry.content: SCOV is unique, there's no duplicate tool to do the same thing. I don't understand your point. "not allowed to get an access". Ask for it if you need it. SCOV doesn't highlight "unused variables". SCOV is not for debug, why are you mixing SCOV and debug?

entry.title: Purchasing currency in business partner.
entry.content:
Hi.

I want to set a default currency for the supplier's company code and purchasing organization data in the Business Partner while creating it in SAP Public Cloud. The currency should update automatically upon opening the Business Partner.

Is there any standard configuration available in SAP Public Cloud to achieve this? If not, how can this be activated without any development or user-specific setup?

Thank.

entry.title: Re: Leading & Trailing Spaces - Custom Fields - Advanced...
entry.content:
I would recommend using a script that executes after changing the value of a custom field. In that script, you could get the last updated field and trim its value, then set the trimmed value back into the last updated field.

In Advanced Workflow's groovy:

def updatedField = form.getLastUpdatedField()
updatedField.setValue(updatedField.getValue().trim())

entry.title: Re: BAPI Display for Material Document Using OOPS Interactive ALV by Double Click Event
entry.content: For information, you may provide the whole code, dynpro and so on, in just one link by using abapGit and creating your Git repository in the Web (GitHub for instance). This way, your blog post might focus on the interesting part which should be (I guess) how your tool works (a tiny user guide in fact).

entry.title: Re: The capability of SAP B1 to handle 10,000 invoices pe...
entry.content:
10000 invoice with 10 rows is a lot, but B1 should be able to handle without issue, although you do need a relatively powerful server to do so, and fast SSD. 

To be honest, adding Invoice is not the real issue but applying payments to those invoices could slow things down though, especially you would use one payment to cover many invoices (thousands or more). So if you do use one payment to cover many invoices, it would be better to design some automation and help to automatically apply the payment in the night time when system load is low.

I did this for amazon sales reconciliation before, it is one payment to cover over 100,000 invoices.

Margit

The event is restricted to the topics mentioned or I can submit a lectures about SAP CAP, for example?

entry.title: Re: Crystal Reports runtime does not export barcode font...
entry.content: The file u25azalea.dll is in the win32_x86 directory on both servers. When using the "SAP Crystal Reports 2016 for Sage" program, I am able to export to PDF with barcodes. However, I am using the .NET runtime version, and when that is used I cannot export barcodes to PDF. There are other directories in the SAP BusinessObjects directory, those all have the correct .dll file on both servers.

entry.title: Re: EC promotion eligibility and Mass upload
entry.content:
Hi @vinkamath

on top of Florin's reply which I am aligned with, please check out this workaround for promotion mass upload:

https://community.sap.com/t5/human-capital-management-blogs-by-sap/mdf-promotion-design-in-compensation-worksheets/ba-p/13465663

 

There is something in the works at the Product team level to modernize the worksheet experience and when that happens they might be able to allow mass import of promotions due to the new framework it will be build on. But until then only the workaround above is possible with the drawback that publish to Job Info cannot be automated anymore it needs to be done manually. 

 

All the best,

Xavier

entry.content: It is indicated that the steps indicated on the SAP Help Page Major Upgrade from Versions Before 16.1 Manually and KBA 2074211 are followed.

entry.title: Re: How to remove decimals from chart on Y-axis
entry.content: Have you considered not using a dual/line chart? Do the decimals appear for a column chart?

But i am having problems trying to POST.

Can you refer to an example for POST with the (New) Universal REST API Integration.

entry.title: Re: How to post cost center in Surcharge Condition in SO(...
entry.content:
Hello, 

reading similar threads listed below. I am affraid, in Public Cloud this functionality is not available 😞

Cost center in Sales Order Line item 
Assing Cost Centers - OVF3 - Cloud Public 

You can submit feature request in order to ask to have this functionality available in the system. 

Please check KBA 2963059 - How to Submit Feature Requests for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Product. 

Best regards,
Patryk

entry.title: Re: Migration of On-Going Project
entry.content:
Automating Project and WBS Migration in SAP ABAP

Yes, it is absolutely feasible to develop an ABAP program to automate this migration. Since we are dealing with a large volume of projects (500) and WBS elements (30,000), the approach must be well-structured to ensure efficiency, data integrity, and error minimization.

🔹 Migration Approach

1️⃣ Data Assessment

📌 Before starting development, it is essential to identify:
✔️ Data sources: Where are the projects and WBS elements stored? (SAP tables, external systems, CSV files, etc.)
✔️ Data structure: What information needs to be migrated? (Project codes, authorization, budget, status, etc.)
✔️ Validation requirements: How can we prevent duplicates and inconsistencies?

👉 Key SAP tables involved:
📌 Projects: PRPS (WBS Elements) and PROJ (Projects)
📌 Budget/Costs: BPJA (WBS Budget) and COEP (Cost Line Items)

2️⃣ ABAP Program Development

✔️ Develop an ABAP report (SE38) to extract data from the old system.
✔️ Implement a data transformation process to match the new system format.
✔️ Use protected BAPIs to create/migrate projects and WBS elements.

👉 Recommended BAPIs:

  • BAPI_PROJECTDEF_CREATE → Creates project definitions
  • BAPI_BUS2054_CREATE_MULTI → Creates multiple WBS elements
  • BAPI_COSTACTPLN_POSTPRIMCOST → Primary cost planning (budget update)

⚠️ If the company uses CJ20N for project management, verify whether project/WBS numbers should remain the same or need to be renamed in the new system.

3️⃣ Execution and Testing

✔️ Develop a test program to validate migration on a small batch of projects/WBS before full execution.
✔️ Implement logs and tracking to monitor errors and migration status.
✔️ Ensure reversibility, in case rollback measures are required.

📌 Suggested Automation

If the data volume is large, consider implementing a background process to avoid system performance issues:

📌 Use Jobs (SM37) to schedule and execute migrations in controlled batches.
📌 Split data into blocks of up to 5,000 WBS elements to optimize performance and reduce risks.

📌 Next Steps

1️⃣ Is the data format for migration already defined? (SAP → SAP, SAP → File, etc.)
2️⃣ Do we need to develop a data degradation report before migration to ensure data quality?
3️⃣ Is the new system ready to receive the data, or does it require structural adjustments?

My name is Raquel Souza - Brazil

entry.title: Re: Managing IUID or UII in SAP EWM
entry.content:
Hello Narsimha,

Thanks for sharing this information. When I am trying to update the IUID relevant indicator in material master, I am getting below error. Can you advice whether do we need to do anything in the serial number profile.

Thanks.

Abdul Jaleel

entry.title: Re: Your Familiar SAP Menu, Now in Fiori! Unlock Easy Access to Your Favorite Transactions
entry.content: Why don't you share the information how to enable this here?

entry.title: Re: Guidelines on Variable Pay for Rating
entry.content:
Hi @Olga_Skarla 

Guidelines apply on the individual component only in Varpay (not on business payout).

So rating is used as a way to say : if rating was 1 exceptional then you can bump up the individual component of this employee's bonus up to 125% of the target payout for example. 

Hope this helps.

What do you mean by "exclude" ? fully remove them from the worksheet or greying them out on the worksheet ?

I think you should be able to grey them out (=preventing them from getting any sort of bump on the individual component) using the standard rules but if you want to fully exclude them you would have to build an MDF design workaround such as this one:

https://blogs.sap.com/2022/05/27/how-to-use-performance-ratings-in-compensation-eligibility-rules/

You can also keep them on the worksheet and do a design like this to make their final payout 0 , see my final comment here:

https://community.sap.com/t5/human-capital-management-q-a/variable-pay-exclusion-of-employees-with-performance-rating-quot-n-a-quot/qaq-p/14045045

All the best,

Xavier

entry.title: Re: Sec 603 automatically move catch-up contributions to...
entry.content: I am also having the same issue. The note you referanced does not contain an option to have the excess pre-tax automatically roll over to post-tax. Looks like SAP didn't finish the coding.

entry.title: Re: An error occured while approving Compensation form
entry.content:
Hi @rezasaputro 

One worksheet with 25k employees in it ? If so it's no wonder it's returning a time out error. 

We recommend at Max 100 employees on one worksheet. 

https://community.sap.com/t5/human-capital-management-blogs-by-sap/how-to-avoid-latency-in-the-compensation-module/ba-p/13494045

I would even open a support ticket as it will most likely be closed right away.

Worst practice design.

All the best

Xavier

entry.title: Re: Sec 603 automatically move catch-up contributions to post tax (Roth)
entry.content: Did you find an answer to this question? We are having the same issue.

entry.title: Re: Sec 603 automatically move catch-up contributions to...
entry.content: No solutions have been found as of today.

entry.title: Re: Improving SAP Integration Suite with a sorting mechanism for DataStore entries
entry.content: Great job and thanks for sharing you insights. 🙂

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to remove the Public Visibility
entry.content: thank you

entry.title: Re: SAP DATASPHERE: DYNAMIC FILTER TO START ON FIRST DAY...
entry.content: Thank you for responding. This what we ended up doing. DECLARE myDate DATE = CONCAT(CAST(YEAR(CURRENT_DATE) - 2 AS VARCHAR), '0101'); DECLARE myDateString VARCHAR(8) = TO_VARCHAR(myDate, 'YYYYMMDD'); DECLARE myDateString2 VARCHAR(8) = '99991231'; return select * from "RT_ECC_ZSDT43000" where "POST_DATE" >= myDateString AND "POST_DATE" <= myDateString2 ;

entry.title: Re: SAP DATASPHERE: DYNAMIC FILTER TO START ON FIRST DAY...
entry.content: Thank

entry.title: Re: SAP DATASPHERE: DYNAMIC FILTER TO START ON FIRST DAY...
entry.content:
This is what we entered to resolve the issue as a SQLScript (Table Function).

DECLARE myDate DATE = CONCAT(CAST(YEAR(CURRENT_DATE) - 2 AS VARCHAR), '0101'); DECLARE myDateString VARCHAR(8) = TO_VARCHAR(myDate, 'YYYYMMDD'); DECLARE myDateString2 VARCHAR(8) = '99991231'; return select * from "RT_ECC_ZSDT43000" where "POST_DATE" >= myDateString AND "POST_DATE" <= myDateString2 ;

entry.title: Fiori App on BAS + BOPF + CDS Annotation
entry.content: I am creating a fiori app in BAS using BOPF and CDS annotation. Strangely, the Delete action works out of the box. The Create button also is shown on the List report but when I click on Create, the Object page is coming blank. Not sure what i am missing. I am using the Template to create app as List Report.

entry.title: Is there a way to edit information entered by technicians in the FSM app?
entry.content: I dispatch technicians via FSM on my computer, and the techs are all using cell phones with the app. Is there a way for any of us to change the information they enter into the forms? Currently, there doesn't seem to be a way to update the forms, which can be bothersome if there is a typo or an incorrect (or additional) letter/number is added to the job.

entry.title: Re: Kit To Stock in SAP EWM
entry.content:
Hi @Yuki_Hino1 

In Kit-to-Stock, based on my understanding, it's not mandatory to maintain Product Group, and using item category NORM in MM01 works fine since it's based on standard stock handling without involving a sales order. But in Kit-to-Order, since it's driven by a sales order, might need specific item categories and additional setup to handle BOM explosion during order processing.

entry.title: Webi 4.3 - Input Control with Descriptions - How to capture Keys?
entry.content:
Hello Gurus:

I am using function =inputcontrolfilter() for capturing the selected values of the input control that contains descriptions (not keys) for passing as variable parameter in Hyperlink for filtering another report.

For example: the input control is based on Company Descriptions, like: Company1-Name, Company2-name, Company3-name, etc. But what I need to get are the corresponding keys from the selected elements, like: 1000,2000,3000, etc.

I can create an Input control based on Keys, and the returned values will be correct, but, user need to see Descriptions instead of codes in the Input Control.

The report contains charts and tables, and the company is not part of the dimension listed there, it is a general filter for the whole report, That's why is not feasible including company keys invisible in any of the elements.

Is there any way of getting the keys from the selected elements in the input control based on descriptions?

I haven't find a standard function that do that, so, probably I will need to do some workaround.

Any help will be much appreciated.

Thanks in advance,

Ibrahim.

entry.title: Non-Valuated Material Type For Management Of Service Tools
entry.content:
We currently have service tools setup with a non-valuated material type (UNBW) in SAP S/4HANA.  These tools are expensed to our service team and do not carry an inventory value.  We occasionally have the need to transfer these service tools between internal financial entities which requires a commercial invoice.  We have the following objectives with this inventory:

  • Maintain costs for transactional purposes and still allow for an expensed or non-valuated inventory accounting
  • Populate a cost on a commercial invoice when transferring between internal financial entities

Is there a hybrid material type or inventory classification that could be used within SAP to account for this scenario?

entry.title: Re: display fiori elements draft edit status in listreport
entry.content:
I found that the Common.SemanticKey annotation solved this issue

annotate myService.myEntity with @Common: {SemanticKey: [title]};

entry.title: Cancel infinite error on event onFinalize in SAP SCREEN PERSONAS
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm using the sap training developpement environement for SAP SCREEN PERSONAS. I have created a flavor for the SMEN and i'm trying to understand how to handle when a script is in error and how to get the hand back on my flavor so i can edit the script back and correct the error.

I have done on purpose an error on the onFinalize event of my flavor by calling a function with one missing parameter.

Even if i close this popup, the system tries de reprocess the script and i'm stuck in a infinite loop.

I'm using Chrome dev tool, i see the script calling onFinalize

Please provide me guidance on this because i'm sure there will be a case in real situation where this will happen...What can i do to to have the hand again on my flavor to edit it?

Thanks a lot for your time.

Regards,

Alexandre

entry.title: Re: Everything you need to know about SAP Cloud Transport Management _ End to End guide
entry.content: Could you share the new link?

entry.title: Re: Migration of On-Going Project
entry.content: The new APIs are built on the latest technology and should be used when posting in S/4HANA. Your developer should be familiar with the difference. You will need to develop a front end app to read your spreadsheet and use the API to post in S/4HANA.

entry.title: Re: Migration of On-Going Project
entry.content: Your migration strategy will depend greatly on what you are converting. Are they all new projects or are they in work and you need to transfer existing costs and or revenues.

entry.title: Re: Trigger event lost in Build Process Automation
entry.content: We are also running into this issue. Was somebody already able to resolve this issue? We are stuck with this at the moment as there is no indication what happens to the event in BPA and why it is not processed correctly.

entry.title: Re: EC promotion eligibility and Mass upload
entry.content: Hi @xavierlegarrec, thanks. That workaround is good. But again my question was with respect to avoiding clicking promote link altogether.

entry.title: Re: Managing IUID or UII in SAP EWM
entry.content:
I got the solution... As per the OSS note "3528499 - IUID fields in material master cannot be entered" we need to maintain TUID  table. I missed this. Now it is working fine.

Thanks.

Abdul Jaleel

entry.title: Re: Trigger event lost in Build Process Automation
entry.content: Maybe @ajmaradiaga can help here?

entry.title: Re: SAP Inside Track Porto 2025
entry.content:
HI @mldoliveira ,

The topics are just a suggestion. You can propose a talk with your topic!

entry.title: Replacement functionality for "Incompletion procedures for missing Foreign Trade Data" in S/4HANA
entry.content: Tcodes VI29, VI49 and table EIUV are not available in S/4HANA since Foreign Trade functionality is deprecated. How to then set up "Incompletion procedures" for missing foreign trade data in S/4HANA? Is there any alternative config. or functionality? Also, any replacement for table EIUV to capture the logs?

entry.title: Re: Cancel infinite error on event onFinalize in SAP SCRE...
entry.content:
I have a partial answer : 

I found my onFinalize script in chrome dev tool

i changed the json content, i save (Ctr+S) + right clic on the file and i chose "Override content". 

=> OK i'm back on the PERSONAS menu but when i tried to change the flavor, it triggered another time the script but in the adaptative flavor that i have underneath my main flavor...

And THIS script was NOT editable. Maybe because it's the same when you are editing an adaptative flavor, it says that script can be edited only in main flavor....I/WE need a solution for this please, this is last missing step before i find my peace of mind!

entry.title: Understanding SAP’s Product Strategy for Governance, Risk, and Compliance (GRC) Solutions
entry.content:
No Customers Left Behind!

In light of recent announcements regarding a new version of the SAP GRC solutions scheduled for 2026 and end-of-maintenance dates, there has been some confusion. Additionally, incorrect statements in the market with respect to support for SAP Access Control & other SAP GRC solutions have added to the uncertainty.  

The 2026 release is a new version of the SAP GRC solutions available for customers to migrate or upgrade to. Version upgrades for HANA based solutions are delivered as part of the standard maintenance process at SAP.

SAPinsider Strategy Presentation

Let’s set the record straight:

  • SAP Access Control and GRC solutions for SAP are NOT end-of-life! 
  • SAP GRC 2026 is a new version (not a new product) for any SAP GRC on HANA customers. 
  • The 2026 release is planned for both on-premises and private cloud deployments. 
  • Exciting innovations are planned for all SAP GRC solutions, including the use of AI, enhanced user interface (UI), improved reporting, and much more. Updated roadmaps will be published on roadmaps.sap.com. This applies to GRC solutions on SAP HANA, on-premises, or in the private cloud. 
  • The 2026 release will be based on a unified platform for SAP GRC solutions. This new platform will facilitate easier cross-GRC scenarios, integration with SAP Business Suite applications, and enhanced AI capabilities. 
  • Existing SAP GRC solutions on SAP HANA will be upgraded to the 2026 release as part of their standard maintenance program, meaning no new SKU or additional purchase is required. 
  • Customers using “classic” versions of SAP GRC (on databases other than SAP HANA) will need to migrate to either the new on-premises or private cloud 2026 version. 
  • End-of-maintenance (EOM) dates for the 2026 version will be updated to align with HANA EOM dates, extending support until 2040.

Critical Solutions for the Enterprise

SAP GRC solutions, including SAP Access Control, Process Control, Risk Management, Business Integrity Screening, Audit Management, Tax Compliance, UI Masking, and UI Logging, have an enormous install base with thousands of active customers many of whom have made significant investments in extensive implementations and customizations. These solutions are vital for managing access and generating critical audit reports to ensure compliance and security across some of the largest and most complex SAP systems worldwide. 

While many of these customers are undergoing a cloud transformation, others are remaining on-premises and have no plans to migrate. The 2026 GRC release ensures a smooth upgrade or migration path, regardless of your current deployment—whether you’re on SAP HANA or running a “classic” system. 

This solution strategy accommodates all SAP GRC customers, ensuring they can easily transition to the latest version—whether they choose to stay on-premises or move to a private cloud. 

More to be announced!!

Look for webinars and information sessions from SAP and partners for additional details and timing on the 2026 release.  

Conclusion

SAP’s GRC solutions continue to evolve, providing customers with new innovations to deliver additional value, streamline processes, and improve the end-user experience. Whether you’re on-premise, in the cloud, or migrating between the two, SAP’s strategy ensures no customers are left behind as we move toward the exciting innovations planned for the 2026 release. Stay tuned for announcements about upcoming SAP and partner webinars! 

 

Authors 

  • Swetta Singh – GRC Chief Product Expert
  • Chris Radkowski – Chief Product Marketing Manager
  • Thomas Frenehard – Chief Product Marketing Manager

entry.title: Re: Cancel infinite error on event onFinalize in SAP SCRE...
entry.content:
I tried a new error like this one :

and now i have this message

It must be another kind of error and here i can't change the JS content using. Don't know what to do....

Edit i know why...it's because i'm on my sub adaptative flavor where i can't modify JS file....still stuck

entry.title: EDOC_COCKPIT error when calling J_1BNFE_INVOICE_CREATE FM in update task
entry.content:
Dear all, 
We are currently analysing a scenario of Brazil localization, for the incoming invoice creation.
The EDOC_COCKPIT transactions is being used, and it calls the function module J_1BNFE_IN_CREATE_400 in starting a new task to create the invoice.

At the new task the function called calls the FM J_1BNFE_INVOICE_CREATE, and in its logic flow it retrieves the transaction for this process.

it keeps the constant value in rbkpv structure.

When calculating taxes, the logic flow doesn`t use the whole structure data, just some fields, and the information of the transaction is lost.

In the FM calculate_tax_document, there is a logic that verifies from which transaction the call is coming to calculate pricing values. 



For invoices that should read the split batch scenario and calculate some brazilian taxes the FBxx transactions dont`t work properly and display an error message, MIRO t-code should be executed. Manually I can take this decision, but since EDOC_COCKPIT is being used I don't  know what to apply as solution in this cases.
I have searched for some posts here in community and it seems that this problem happens since 2015, at least. 

Does someone knows some config, customizing or sap note for this issue?

 SAP Electronic Invoicing for Brazil (SAP Nota Fiscal Eletronica) MM Invoice Verification

entry.title: How can I filter for an automatic HU label printing when there is a change in status?
entry.content:
We are experiencing an issue in the "Output parameter determination" application where we are unable to set filters that would trigger the automatic printing of HU labels. Specially, we need to automatically print new HU labels when there is a change in status or when new label are generated. Currently, is possible to trigger automatic printing of HU labels only at the HU creation moment by posting a GR in the app MIGO or in the HU creation step for inbound delivery in the app "Change inbound deliveries".


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How can I filter for an automatic HU label printing w...
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

I would recommend using the HU Step U (Update) to also print the label, when the HU is changed.

See Also: Output Management for HU Documents, HU Shipping Label and HU Label.

 

Kind regards,

Geovana

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud Identity Access Governance, Integration Edition: Configuration Settings and Implementa
entry.content:
@Uppdeep_Mann ,

Thanks for the suggestions!

For the second point, when Identity Access Governance integration is being used with Access Control, the mitigation assignment workflow can't be used from Access Request process. This is not planned in the roadmap yet.

For third point, the Identity Access Governance roles have to be synchronized using the repository synchronization option as mentioned in the blog.
